_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Paperclip
author: lmsjogando@gmail.com
description: Run Paperclip, an open-source orchestration platform for managing AI agents, teams, goals, budgets, and automated workflows.

variables.name: Database URL
variables.description: PostgreSQL connection URL used by Paperclip. The database must be reachable from this container.

variables.name: Authentication Secret
variables.description: Secret used to sign authentication sessions. Replace the default with a long, unique, randomly generated value.

variables.name: Tool Action Signing Secret
variables.description: Secret used to sign and verify Paperclip tool actions. Replace the default with a different long, randomly generated value.

variables.name: Discord Webhook URL
variables.description: Optional Discord webhook URL used to send notifications. Leave this field empty to disable Discord notifications.

variables.name: Deployment Mode
variables.description: Choose how users authenticate. Use authenticated for remotely accessible deployments; local_trusted is intended only for trusted local environments.

variables.name: Deployment Exposure
variables.description: Choose whether the Paperclip instance is private to your network or publicly accessible. Public deployments should always use HTTPS and strong authentication.

variables.name: Allow All OpenCode Models
variables.description: Allow Paperclip agents using the OpenCode adapter to access every model available through OpenCode.
